name: gtm-engineering-command-center
description: Autonomous GTM operating system. 16 agents, 30 commands, 17 skills, 5 cloud routines. Multichannel orchestration (Meta Ads + Google Ads at parity), AARRR funnel diagnostics, Tribe v2 neural pre-testing, Synthetic Demand Validation (SDV) for science-backed demand/price/objection pre-testing with a unified neuro+SDV pre-flight gate and Van Westendorp/Gabor-Granger pricing, the High-Velocity Advertising (HVA) engine for creative discovery at machine speed (CLEAR + deterministic scorer + the Vault moat), browser QA (Playwright + Computer Use), cross-channel attribution, codebase-aware asset generation, and always-on optimization via Claude Code Routines.
